processedSuggestions.statusText: You should have the RSV vaccine

actions.description:
## Get vaccinated at your GP surgery

Contact your GP surgery to book an appointment.

## Book an appointment online at a pharmacy

You can book an appointment online at a pharmacy that offers the RSV vaccination. You need to be registered with a GP to do this.

## Get vaccinated without an appointment

You can get an RSV vaccination at some pharmacies without needing an appointment.

You do not need to be registered with a GP to do this.
actions.urlLabel: Find a pharmacy where you can get a free RSV vaccination

actions.description:
## If you think this is incorrect

If you have already had this vaccination or your personal details are wrong, visit our [help and support page](https://digital.nhs.uk/services/eligibility-data-product-elid).

processedSuggestions.statusText: You should have the COVID-19 vaccine

eligibilityCohorts.cohortText: are aged 75 or over by 31 January 2026

actions.description:
## Get vaccinated at your GP surgery

Contact your GP surgery to book an appointment.

## Book an appointment online at a pharmacy

You can book an appointment online at a pharmacy that offers the COVID-19 vaccination.

## Get vaccinated without an appointment

You can find a walk-in COVID-19 vaccination site to get a vaccination without an appointment. You do not need to be registered with a GP.
actions.urlLabel: Find a walk-in COVID-19 vaccination site
